## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run verify` is green (if this touches a demo or the template)
- [ ] No source screenshots or app assets committed (see [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] The description is honest about any gaps or things left mocked
